name: Companhia de Seguros Alianca da Bahia
summary: Companhia de Seguros Alianca da Bahia operates as an insurance company in Brazil and Uruguay. The company individual personal accident, residential, legal person, group life, condo and business, operational risk, and named insurance products. Companhia de Seguros Alianca da Bahia was founded in 1870 and is based in Salvador, Brazil.
